name: answer-question
description: Answer a question based on provided context or general knowledge.

context.description: Source text or document to base the answer on. If omitted, uses general knowledge.

maxLength.description: Maximum word count for the answer. Default: 100.

language.description: Answer language. If omitted, matches the question language.

grounded.description: True if the answer is based on the provided context, false if from general knowledge.

errors.message: Input does not conform to the schema.
Model output does not conform to the schema.
